_publications._publicationTitle: A clinically and genomically annotated nerve sheath tumor biospecimen repository

basicInfo.description: NF1-associated MPNST patient-derived xenograft obtained from the Johns Hopkins NF1 biospecimen repository
basicInfo.clinicalData: NF1 diagnosis age: <5 years; dermal neurofibromas: scattered; plexiform neurofibromas: present; optic glioma: absent; family history of NF1: no
basicInfo.developerAffiliation: Department of Oncology, Johns Hopkins University School of Medicine; Sidney Kimmel Comprehensive Cancer Center
